messages.subject: URGENT: Skin burning after using device
messages.body: Hi, I used the micro-infusion device for the first time yesterday and now my skin is red, burning and there are small blood spots. Is this normal? Should I continue using it? I'm really worried.

messages.subject: Return request - order #DRP-2026-1847
messages.body: Hello, I'd like to return my device. I opened it and tried it once but it's not what I expected. My order number is DRP-2026-1847 and I'm in the US. I purchased it 12 days ago. Can I get a full refund?

messages.subject: Where is my order? Tracking stuck
messages.body: Hi, my order #DRP-2026-2103 was shipped 15 days ago to Canada. The tracking says 'Customs Clearance' for the past 5 days. Is something wrong? When will I receive it?

metadata.description: Mock Gmail threads for testing customer-support agent. All emails are synthetic — no real customer data.
metadata.note: Replace example.com domains with real addresses only in production. Never commit real customer emails to the repository.
